description: Style NoteAdd a pop meets punk edge to this season to your summer staples from Miss Sep. Style this piece with non-typical wardrobe updaters like a chunky bracelet or clunky heels to add an instant spunk to your ensemble. For a girly vibe, wear this with a pastel scarf or shrug and a whimsical hair accessory - effortless spring style! Product DetailsTwo piece top with a purple sleeveless tank acting as the inner. Blue and white striped crop top with a deep V-neck, long sleeves and a buttoned placketMaterial and CarePolyester blendRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
